posts.content: 我在阿雅克肖出生——欧陆的王冠与刺刀在我头顶翻滚，而我注定要跑得比谁都快。
posts.translation: I was born in Ajaccio—crowns and bayonets churned above Europe, and I meant to outrun everyone.

posts.content: 土伦一战：火炮、时机与孤注一掷。我向自己证明——命运眷顾敢于抓住决胜点的人。
posts.translation: Toulon—guns, timing, audacity. I proved to myself fortune favors whoever seizes the decisive point.

posts.content: 雾月十八日，我用行动而非演说夺取中枢——在思潮再度散乱之前，我必须把权力攥稳。
posts.translation: 18 Brumaire—I took the center with movement, not speeches; before ideas scattered again I had to grip power.

posts.content: 我被囚于圣赫勒拿——地图缩成一座岛，但我的思绪仍在整个欧洲行军。
posts.translation: They caged me on Saint Helena—the map shrank to one island, yet my mind still marched across Europe.
